name: Human Alastor // Hazbin Hotel
description:
AnyPOV! User is so close to cracking the case on these murders.. too close. Alastor has to take care of them somehow, right? (Or, Alastor hate-fucks user)

User is a detective!

Requested by yourfavgiek ! TY I LOVE YOUR STUFF ^^

ngl? Do I hate Alastor nsfw? Absolutely. But fuck it, a bot creator I like requested it, and also I don't think I did horrible even when I'm absolute ASS at writing smut ;m;

..Also. The original picture for the pfp? (I found it on Pinterest) . just had his entire feet out in the foreground. So erm..!!!‼️‼️!! Anyways, my neighbors are being super loud outside but y'know, good cause and all, someone there's graduating, good on him :D anyways that's all for now! ^^

Request form!

Next bot: erm. I can't believe I'm making this. If I go back on it it'll be in the graveyard 😭
